concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文明确列出了5条假设，包括无人机型号、FAA规则、观众安全距离、天气条件、无人机同步性，每条假设都给出了理由。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: The model of the drones used in this show is the Intel® Shooting Star™ drone... Assumption 2: The show will be part of an annual festival of a city in the United States of America, and will have to comply with rules related to drone operation stated by the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA)...

concepts_used.title: 最短路径算法（Dijkstra、Floyd）
concepts_used.how_used: 将过渡时间最小化问题转化为二分图匹配和二分搜索，寻找最小化最大距离的匹配，等价于最小化过渡时间。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: to minimise the transition time between every display for better light show experience, which is equivalent to minimising the maximum distance travelled by any drone, we employed bipartite matching and binary search.

concepts_used.title: 遗传算法
concepts_used.how_used: 使用遗传算法优化点选择，从轮廓中选取关键点，使得选取的点能代表形状且数量与无人机数量匹配。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: A point selection was performed to locate important points using an algorithms constructed by our own, generating a list of positions that need to be occupied by drones.

concepts_used.title: 矩阵运算
concepts_used.how_used: 使用变换矩阵实现显示动画，包括旋转和剪切，对每个无人机的位置应用变换矩阵。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Animation for the three displays is in the form of rotation or shearing, both of which make use of transformation matrix.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过改变无人机数量、显示持续时间、安全距离等参数，分析对总时间、所需空间和成本的影响。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Based on our model, 480 drones will be employed... the duration of the whole aerial light show will be 329s.

concepts_used.title: 地理信息可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 使用三维坐标和地理可视化展示无人机的位置和飞行路径，包括安全区域和观众区域。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: By using a three-dimensional coordinate, our model will determine the exact position and flight path of each individual drone throughout the entire show.

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：Introduction, Methods, Results, Discussion，并包含摘要、假设、定义、变量等部分。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Chapter 1 Introduction... Chapter 2 Definitions, Assumptions, Justifications, and Variables...

concepts_used.title: 三天/四天赛程时间分配
concepts_used.how_used: 在摘要和正文中明确给出了各阶段时间：起飞36s，过渡30s和59s，显示60s，降落33s，总时长329s。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: the transition time between displays 1 and 2 and between displays 2 and 3 will be 30s and 59s respectively. Provided that the take-off time and landing time will be 36s and 33s respectively, the duration of the aerial light show will be 329s.
